creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256606
0001-x11-wm-spectrwm-Update-to-3.6.0.patch

(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #8)
> You've two choices: patch the freebsd/Makefile or
> the do-install does the install stage.

Unfortunately I had to do the both. I got faced with "the lib file does not have a SONHAME" error in stage-qa and this patch in filesdir fixes it by removing version name from .so lib file.

Other than that, I think it's ready.

> as I see the ${FIND} doesn't find any file in post-patch. If it's true you should remove it.

I think I fixed it too.

Thanks in advance.
